name: read_file
description: Retrieve file contents with line support and revision options. File size limit is 128KB. Use line ranges for larger files.

repo.description: The repository name to read the file from

path.description: The file path within the repository

startLine.description: Optional starting line number for partial file reads

endLine.description: Optional ending line number for partial file reads

revision.description: Optional revision (branch, tag, or commit) to read from

name: list_files
description: Display files and directories within repository paths

repo.description: The repository name to list files from

path.description: Optional directory path within the repository to list

revision.description: Optional revision (branch, tag, or commit) to list files from

name: list_repos
description: Search repositories by name with pagination capabilities

query.description: Search query to filter repositories by name

limit.description: Maximum number of repositories to return. Default is 50

after.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results

before.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the previous page of results

name: keyword_search
description: Execute exact keyword searches with boolean operators and filters. Supports repo:, file:, rev: filters.

query.description: The keyword search query. Supports operators like AND, OR, NOT and filters like repo:, file:, rev:

name: nls_search
description: Perform semantic searching with linguistic flexibility. Supports repo:, file:, rev: filters.

query.description: The natural language search query. Supports filters like repo:, file:, rev:

name: go_to_definition
description: Locate symbol definitions from usage points

repo.description: The repository name containing the symbol

path.description: The file path where the symbol is referenced

symbol.description: The symbol name to find the definition for

name: find_references
description: Identify all symbol usages across codebase

repo.description: The repository name containing the symbol definition

path.description: The file path where the symbol is defined

symbol.description: The symbol name to find all references for

name: commit_search
description: Query commits by message, author, content, and dates

repos.description: Array of repository names to search commits in

messageTerms.description: Optional terms to search for in commit messages

authors.description: Optional list of authors to filter commits by

contentTerms.description: Optional terms to search for in commit content/diff

files.description: Optional list of file paths to filter commits by

after.description: Optional date to filter commits after (ISO 8601 format)

before.description: Optional date to filter commits before (ISO 8601 format)

pattern.description: Pattern to search for in diffs

repos.description: Repository name(s) to search diffs in

added.description: Optional flag to filter for added lines only

removed.description: Optional flag to filter for removed lines only

author.description: Optional author to filter diffs by

after.description: Optional date to filter diffs after (ISO 8601 format)

before.description: Optional date to filter diffs before (ISO 8601 format)

repo.description: The repository name to compare revisions in

base.description: The base revision (branch, tag, or commit) to compare from

head.description: The head revision (branch, tag, or commit) to compare to

first.description: Number of commits to show. Default is 50

author.description: The contributor's username or email to search for

limit.description: Maximum number of repositories to return. Default is 20

minCommits.description: Minimum number of commits required to include a repository. Default is 1

name: deepsearch
description: Initiate Deep Search conversations for complex codebase questions

question.description: The complex question to ask about the codebase

name: deepsearch_read
description: Retrieve existing Deep Search conversation content

identifier.description: The identifier for the Deep Search conversation. Accepts URLs or read tokens.
